Package org.areslib.hardware.wrappers

Class AresGamepad

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.hardware.wrappers.AresGamepad
public class AresGamepad extends Object
Wrapper around the FTC Gamepad providing WPILib-style Trigger bindings and pre-inverted stick axes (Up = positive Y).

Usage note: Trigger accessors (e.g. a()) are lazily cached. It is safe to call gamepad.a().onTrue(cmd) inside configureBindings() without creating duplicate registrations.

    • bindOnTrue

      public Trigger bindOnTrue(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command cmd)
      Binds a command to a Trigger's `.onTrue()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to AresTelemetry.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance (e.g. this.a())
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name (e.g. "A_Button")
      actionName - The macro the button runs (e.g. "Score Gamepiece")
      cmd - The Command to schedule
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • bindWhileTrue

      public Trigger bindWhileTrue(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command cmd)
      Binds a command to a Trigger's `.whileTrue()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to AresTelemetry.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance (e.g. this.a())
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name (e.g. "RightTrigger")
      actionName - The macro the button runs (e.g. "Shoot On Move")
      cmd - The Command to schedule
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • bindOnFalse

      public Trigger bindOnFalse(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command cmd)
      Binds a command to a Trigger's `.onFalse()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to AresTelemetry.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance (e.g. this.a())
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name (e.g. "A_Button")
      actionName - The macro the button runs (e.g. "Retract System")
      cmd - The Command to schedule
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • getBindingsMap

      public Map<String,String> getBindingsMap()
      Generates a raw mapping of binding pairs.
      Returns:
      A map mapping physical button names to current string macros.

    • getGamepad

      public com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.Gamepad getGamepad()
      Returns the raw underlying FTC Gamepad object.
      Returns:
      The raw Gamepad object.

    • rumble

      public void rumble(int durationMs)
      Rumbles the controller.
      Parameters:
      durationMs - Duration in milliseconds.

    • rumble

      public void rumble(double rumble1, double rumble2, int durationMs)
      Rumbles the controller with variable strength.
      Parameters:
      rumble1 - Motor 1 strength (0.0 to 1.0)
      rumble2 - Motor 2 strength (0.0 to 1.0)
      durationMs - Duration in milliseconds.

    • setLedColor

      public void setLedColor(double r, double g, double b, int durationMs)
      Sets the LED color of the controller (PS4/PS5 compatibility).
      Parameters:
      r - Red (0.0 to 1.0)
      g - Green (0.0 to 1.0)
      b - Blue (0.0 to 1.0)
      durationMs - Duration in ms.

    • logInputsToTelemetry

      public void logInputsToTelemetry()
      Logs all raw controller axes and buttons directly into the AdvantageKit telemetry pipeline to ensure perfect driver visibility and match log reviewability.
